description: Allow a fresh go-project-template clone to validate itself by cloning/updating the sibling go-workflow-stack checkout when missing.
acceptance: scripts/check.sh bootstraps or locates go-workflow-stack before running make check.
Makefile check validates, readbacks, statuses, and runs stack template-check when available.
README documents fresh-clone self-check and paired stack validation.

evidence.summary: bash scripts/check.sh passed; python3 ../go-workflow-stack/cli/go.py template-check . --json ok=true
